reviews.title: Nice Hotel, Just Short of Excellent
reviews.positives:
he location of the hotel was excellent, and the rooms were comfortable and well-maintained. Breakfast was decent, though there is scope for improvement in terms of variety and quality.

The main area of concern was the service. Response times were quite slow, and the checkout process alone took nearly 20–25 minutes, which could certainly be made more efficient.

Considering the price, the in-room amenities could also be enhanced to provide better value for guests.

Overall, I would rate the room experience an 8/10.
reviews.negatives: Service remains a big question mark. While the staff were polite and courteous, the response time for almost everything—be it parking, room service, general requests, or even checkout—was far too slow.

reviews.title: Cant be 5*
reviews.text: This hotel is 4* max. Locate in a residence building so you share elevators with residence. Hotel has their own lobby checkin at level 6. Worst thing is room cant block any basic noise from outside street or hallway. Bed was really hard so i had hard time sleeping. Breakfast was the only place looked standard.  1st time in my life seen gym closed during lunch time. Around hotel has many local convenient stores and laundry. Very far to walk to the beach.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We truly regret to hear that your recent stay did not meet your expectations.

While our hotel is indeed located within a residence building, we have designed a private lobby and check-in area on Level 6 to ensure a more exclusive experience for our guests. We’re sorry to hear that the soundproofing and mattress comfort did not meet your needs — your comments have been shared with our management team for further review and improvement.

Regarding the gym closure during lunchtime, we appreciate you bringing this to our attention and will reassess the operating hours to better accommodate our guests.

On a positive note, we’re glad you enjoyed the breakfast and found the surrounding area convenient with many local shops and services.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback — it helps us to improve and provide a better experience for all our guests.

Warm regards,

reviews.title: I recommend this place
reviews.positives: The rooms were spacious and clean. The premium rooms were high up and the view is beautiful..it is close to the malls and there is a strip with spas and stores near the hotel. A little ways down is an affordable karaoke spot as well. I love the complete gym.
reviews.negatives: The front desk lobby is not constantly air conditioned which made checking in and checking out a little hot. I did go during an off season, however, so they may have been conserving energy. I felt bad for the staff since it was a hot season.

reviews.title: Short holiday
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, new, clean, right in the center, close to delicious restaurants, quite peaceful, with adequate amenities. However, if you rent a motorcycle, you can park it at an outside parking lot right at gate 1, or if you park in the basement, you need to walk a bit further, as the hotel is located at gate 2 of the building, which is quite large with many gates.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed review with us.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed your short stay and appreciated the hotel’s cleanliness, new facilities, convenient central location, quiet atmosphere, and nearby dining options. Your positive comments are truly encouraging for our team.

We also sincerely appreciate your feedback regarding the parking and motorbike access arrangement. As the building has multiple entrances and the hotel is located at Gate 2, accessing the basement parking may require a slightly longer route. We will continue working to provide clearer guidance and improve convenience for our guests.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back for another pleasant stay in the future.

Best regards,

reviews.title: Bad experience on the 3rd day of Tet.
reviews.text:
The entire road in front of and behind the hotel is crowded with cars that have no parking spaces, forcing them to park along the street.

The rooms are small, everything is designed with sliding doors to save space, but in my room, the bathroom door is difficult to open, it's a double room but too small and there's no option to separate the beds.

The staff is professional but all of them focus only on the hotel lobby; the hotel is on the sixth floor, but the ground floor lobby only has a security guard to guide you. You have to manage the elevator and your belongings by yourself, and the check-in and check-out process is quite time-consuming.

The experience was extremely poor, I will not return for a second time.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your stay during the Lunar New Year holiday. We sincerely regret to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations.

Firstly, we truly apologize for the inconvenience caused by the parking situation. As the 3rd day of Tet is one of the peak travel periods of the year, traffic and parking around the area can become extremely crowded. We understand how frustrating this must have been and appreciate your understanding.

Regarding the room size and layout, our property is designed in a modern, space-optimized style, which includes sliding doors to maximize functionality. However, we are sorry to learn that the bathroom door was difficult to operate and that the room did not fully meet your comfort preferences. reviews.title: Cũng cũng á!
reviews.text:
Mình đi một mình.

Điểm cộng: luôn có phòng, khá sạch sẽ và đầy đủ tiện nghi, có ban công. Giá quá rẻ cho ks 5* (~500/dem)
Điểm trừ: khó tìm địa chỉ, tìm cổng và hầm! Dù là khách sạn 5* nhưng cách âm kém, khách nói chuyện gì ở hành lang là nghe rõ mồn một! Khách sạn rất rất ít biển chỉ dẫn :(
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết bạn hài lòng về sự sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi, có ban công và đặc biệt là mức giá hợp lý so với tiêu chuẩn 5*. Việc luôn có phòng sẵn sàng phục vụ cũng là điều chúng tôi luôn cố gắng duy trì để mang lại sự thuận tiện cho khách lưu trú, kể cả khi đi một mình như bạn.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì những bất tiện bạn gặp phải trong việc tìm địa chỉ, cổng vào và hầm gửi xe. reviews.title: Rainy stay
reviews.text:
Unfortunately the weather was not great foe most if our 6 night stay.  On our final day we did get to finally go up to the roof top pool (the other one was closed) also the poolscare both closed between 11:00 am and 3:00 pm, which would usually be our optimal lounge time.   The only lounge chairs were on the ledge in about 10" of freezing cold water.  My husband took one put, but the pool attendant quickly came by and told him no, an put it back.  The only other chairs were in the far corner, and there was a bench along the other side.  After a while about 10 -15 other guests showed up to used the pool, like us, no  one wanted to be out in the cold water, it wasn't a very hot day.  We ended up leaving as it wasn't the pool side experience we were hoping for.  The buffet breakfast was good, but for 4 days we had breakfast off the menu, which never arrived quite the way we had ordered it
 The only other problem we had when we first arrived in the building lobby, we had no idea where to go!  We asked at the information desk or whatever it is, and the doorman guy asked to see my reservation.  I showed him on my phone, and he told me to call the hotel!  I told him I didn't have phone service in Vietnam,  (Google Translate) and he showed us to the elevator and pushed 6.  Once we found the Hotel Reception things went smoothly.  The staff were all very friendly, and our room was very nice.

reviews.title: A Mixed Experience at This Hotel
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at this hotel, and while there were some positive aspects, there were also several areas that need improvement. Let me break it down:
Positives:
Cleanliness: The housekeepers did an excellent job maintaining cleanliness in my room. Kudos to them!
Power and AC Management: Unlike many other hotels, this one doesn’t turn off the power or air conditioning when you leave the room. They provide two keys, which is a smart approach.
Areas for Improvement:
Noise and Ignorant Guests: Unfortunately, the hotel suffers from a noise, trash problem.There are loud guests who also trashed everywhere, and it’s hard to avoid them. If you can overlook this, it’s not a deal-breaker.
Restaurant Ambiance: The restaurant, with its beautiful view, has great potential. However, it’s uncomfortably hot. Solving this issue would attract more customers.
Room Size: My room felt cramped, especially if you have large luggage. A bit more space would be appreciated.
Overall Rating: 10/10 Despite the shortcomings, I still rate this hotel highly. The cleanliness, thoughtful power management, and other positives outweigh the negatives.

I would like to sincerely thank the reception staff, the person who assisted with the luggage, and the one who helped with the pool for making our family's vacation so comfortable. 
We will return as soon as possible. 
♡♡♡

Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận tuyệt vời về kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn.

Thật vui khi biết rằng Quý khách đã có những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ với không gian yên bình giữa lòng thành phố, cảnh quan núi non, hồ bơi vô cực cũng như sự thuận tiện khi di chuyển đến các địa điểm ẩm thực tại Phú Yên. Đặc biệt, những lời khen dành cho bạn Tuyền tại Lễ tân, anh Bellman hỗ trợ hành lý và nhân viên hồ bơi là nguồn động viên rất lớn đối với toàn bộ đội ngũ của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ gửi lời ghi nhận này đến các bạn.

Sự hài lòng và những khoảnh khắc thư giãn của Quý khách chính là động lực để chúng tôi không ngừng hoàn thiện chất lượng dịch vụ mỗi ngày.

reviews.response:

reviews.title: WORTH EVERY PENNY
reviews.text:
I and my partner stayed here for 2 nights and had a pleasant stay overall. 
I booked an M-Continental room, not so spacey, but cozy, and well organized. The room was nice, super clean, new and modern with Cham vibe. The lobby is also in decoration of Cham culture, bamboo-ish tables and chairs, looked cool to me. They had 2 swimming pool, one on the roof top, and one on 6th floor, we tried the one on the roof and it was magnificently wonderful experience, the pool is big, infinity and overviews the sea, super nice. 
The hotel offer daily cleaning, pool, in-room dining, and everything you expect from a 4-5 star property. They offered us welcome drink, lemonade, which is deliciously sweet, after a 3-hour long ride, that was all we expected, and we liked it. We also get a coupon for another (official) welcome drink which was matcha chocolate something, tasted great (you should use it when you check out while waiting a room check). 
The staff is friendly, professional, i still remember a thoughtful housekeeper who asked if we need daily room cleaning, we just needed to change some towels and refill complimentary water, she offered to change all towels and cleaned our toilet and trash bin, so wonderful. Also thank Ms Tuyen, Y from the front desk who professionally checked us in and out, and Ms Khanh, a GSA whom we shared our stay experience to. Eventhough me and my partner had some issues about the parking and room hygiene, they was willing to listen and handled it well, thank you. 😊 
And for tourist who travels by motobike or car, if you come to hotel earlier than check in time and need to wait for room, make sure you check with the front desk your room number if you want to grab some food outside, because you need to pay for parking if you don't have the room number yet. Also, check if you book your room via official website and channel, or else you have to pay for swimming pool service. 

❤️❤️❤️

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.text: The hotel is located on a spacious avenue, conveniently close to a supermarket inside a shopping mall. The room was clean and tidy, dust-free, with a balcony offering a clear view of Chóp Chài Mountain. There are two swimming pools on the 6th floor and rooftop. The TV includes YouTube, so I could listen to music (yeah it sounds trivial but important to my experience). Nearby, there's a fish noodle soup stall on Tran Phu Street, a clay pot rice restaurant on Hung Vuong Street just near the shopping, and a chive "banh canh" soup restaurant also on Hung Vuong Street near the intersection with Nguyen Huu Tho Street. You can walk to Thanh Nien Park and Ho Son Park. In the evening, it's best to take a taxi if you want to visit the colorful Nghinh Phong Tower, as you’ll pass through some dark roads around a number of undeveloped lots if you take a walk. The hotel also offers shuttle services to various tourist spots in Phu Yen province. However, please note that these are just transportation services and not organized tours. The staff are cheerful and attentive. When I requested a higher floor, they checked availability and placed me on the highest floor!

reviews.title: The ideal accommodation for couples.
reviews.text: When I first arrived, the security staff warmly welcomed me and provided enthusiastic guidance. Checking in on the 6th floor of the hotel, the receptionists were also very friendly and lovely. My room was located on the 25th floor with a view of Hung Vuong Boulevard and part of the sea, which was extremely chill. Although the room was a bit small, it was fully equipped with a large bed that comfortably accommodated two adults, and the TV was big, about 50 inches, while the bathroom had completely new fixtures. I booked a room with a buffet breakfast and had free access to the swimming pool and gym (unfortunately, I visited during the rough sea season, so it was a bit too windy and cold to swim). The food on the 5th floor was quite delicious. In the evening, we had drinks here, and they were excellent (I went with four people, and all four praised the drinks). The hotel has a basement for free car parking. It's right on Hung Vuong Boulevard in the center of Tuy Hoa City, so getting to various sightseeing spots was quite convenient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
J’ai séjourné plusieurs semaines à l’hôtel et je voulais partager mon expérience, car cet établissement mérite clairement d’être davantage reconnu.

C’est l’un des plus grands immeubles de la ville, offrant une très belle vue et des prestations qui le placent clairement dans le haut du niveau local, tout en conservant un excellent rapport qualité-prix. On y trouve notamment deux belles piscines ainsi qu’une salle de sport bien équipée, ce qui permet de profiter d’un vrai confort au quotidien.

Le petit déjeuner est particulièrement qualitatif. Selon l’affluence, il est proposé soit sous forme de buffet, soit à la carte, mais dans les deux cas, la qualité reste au rendez-vous. Il y a une vraie flexibilité et une réelle attention portée aux clients.

Le personnel est un autre point fort de l’établissement. De l’accueil jusqu’à la direction, en passant par toute l’équipe — les femmes de ménage, les personnes chargées de la surveillance des piscines, le service de nettoyage, le gardiennage et tous les autres métiers que j’oublie sûrement — tout le monde est attentif, souriant et professionnel. Cela crée une atmosphère agréable et contribue fortement à la qualité du séjour.

Concernant la restauration du soir, elle est étonnamment excellente. Malgré une faible fréquentation, ce qui est assez surprenant, les plats servis sont d’une très grande qualité. Honnêtement, j’ai mangé dans des restaurants très bien notés de la ville, mais ici, le niveau est supérieur. Les produits sont frais, les cuissons sont maîtrisées et la régularité est impressionnante. J’ai particulièrement apprécié un saumon parfaitement cuit accompagné de légumes, ainsi que plusieurs plats à base de poulet ou de riz, toujours réussis. Les cocktails faits maison sont également une très bonne surprise.

Oui, je pense que cette cuisine mérite beaucoup plus de reconnaissance. Le travail réalisé en coulisses ne se voit pas forcément, mais il est clairement au top.

L’emplacement est parfois perçu comme un inconvénient car légèrement excentré, mais en réalité il reste plutôt pratique. Il y a de la location de scooters juste à proximité, ce qui permet de se déplacer facilement. Le quartier est calme, avec peu de circulation, ce qui rend le séjour encore plus reposant.

La plage se trouve à environ un à deux kilomètres. Elle n’est pas toujours exploitable tous les jours : durant la période où j’y étais, il y avait pas mal de vent et les rayons UV sont particulièrement forts. Cela ne m’a pas vraiment posé de problème, mais il faut en être conscient.

Non loin, à quelques pas, se trouve également l’un des plus grands centres commerciaux de la ville, voire le seul de cette envergure, ce qui reste très pratique.

L’hôtel est organisé entre une partie hôtelière et une partie type condo, et les tarifs restent très raisonnables au regard des prestations proposées.

En résumé, c’est un établissement confortable, propre, bien équipé et surtout porté par une équipe vraiment attentionnée. Un lieu qui mérite clairement d’être mieux connu et davantage soutenu.

(Je me suis peut-être un peu étendu, mais je pense que c’était important de partager une vision complète de l’expérience.)

Le restaurant mérite également d’être souligné. Le petit-déjeuner est excellent, avec un très large choix de produits de qualité. Quant au restaurant en lui-même, même s’il peut paraître vide, ce qui pourrait laisser penser à un problème, c’est en réalité tout le contraire. Les plats sont délicieux, probablement grâce à un très bon chef.

À cela s’ajoutent une salle de sport bien équipée ainsi que deux piscines au top, qui viennent compléter des prestations déjà très satisfaisantes et renforcent encore l’attrait de l’établissement.

🙏❤️👍

reviews.title: Khách sạn tồi tệ nhất
reviews.text: Địa chỉ không rõ ràng, đến điểm hướng dẫn theo google là 1 toà căn hộ. Quầy lễ tân căn hộ không có nhân viên. Khi khách hỏi địa chỉ khách sạn, bảo vệ căn hộ nói không biết. Số điện thoại hotline được cung cấp qua email xác nhận không có người trực. Sau 1 tiếng đi loanh quanh thì tôi tìm được số điện thoại trên google. Bạn nhân viên trực điện thoại nói KS ở tầng 6. Tôi hỏi tầng 6 của cái gì thì nhân viên nói tầng 6 toà nhà đó chị? Hỏi toà nhà nào thì nhân viên hỏi chị toà nhà nào?????? Đến khi tả 1 hồi thì tôi quay lại đúng khu căn hộ mà bảo vệ nói ko biết KS ở đâu. Thang máy lên KS chung với khu căn hộ và cư dân mặc đồ ngủ đi dép lê loẹt quẹt lên xuống. Mệt rã rời, tôi thanh tán luôn tiền KS để sáng check out đi luôn thì nhân viên bắt đặt cọc theo quy định. Tôi hỏi quy định của KS là hotline không cần nhân viên trực thì lễ tân trả lời chắc buổi tối các bạn không làm????? Phòng khách sạn 5 sao bé đến mức đi 1 bước là đụng giường đụng kệ, không có 1 chiếc ghế, không có tủ treo quần áo. Giá treo mắc phía trên kệ để vali kê sát giường, vướng tủ đầu giường và chễm chệ 1 chiếc két sắt. Tức là tôi chỉ có cách để vali xuống đất. Đệm cứng và gối cao. Buổi sáng check out tôi gặp quản lí và cô ấy không nói 1 lời xin lỗi mà đổ tại nhân viên, bảo vệ sơ suất không biết đón khách. Tôi không hiểu cơ quan nào gắn sao cho cơ sở lưu trú tự nhận là khách sạn này. Một trải nghiệm tồi tệ ở Phú Yên xinh đẹp. Chất lượng dịch vụ như vậy thật làm xấu hổ người Phú Yên và những người yêu mến Phú Yên.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian để đóng góp về chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn Mandala Hotel & Spa Phú Yên.  Những đóng góp của Quý khách sẽ giúp chúng tôi cải thiện dịch vụ mỗi ngày.
Chúng tôi xin chân thành xin lỗi về những bất tiện mà Quý khách đã gặp phải trong suốt quá trình lưu trú tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi đã nghiêm túc xem xét lại những bất cập mà quý khách đã nhắc đến và sẽ có những biện pháp khắc phục kịp thời.  
Chúc Quý khách có thật nhiều sức khỏe, hạnh phúc và bình an. Chúng tôi rất mong sẽ lại được chào đón Quý khách vào một dịp gần nhất. 
Trân trọng.

Quầy lễ tân đặt ở tầng 6 chứ kg phải trệt do trong tòa nhà còn có căn hộ dịch vụ chủ nhà tự cho thuê. Muốn lên phòng phải di chuyển 2 lần thang máy, từ trệt lên lầu 6, rồi đi qua thang khác để lên phòng khách sạn. 
Toilet hôi mùi cống nồng nặc, vòi sen đặt ngay sát bên bồn cầu, mỗi lần tắm xong nguyên toilet đầy nước.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian để đóng góp về chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn Mandala Hotel & Spa Phú Yên.  Những đóng góp chân thành của Quý khách sẽ giúp chúng tôi cải thiện dịch vụ mỗi ngày.
Liên quan đến vấn đề mùi hôi và thoát nước chậm trong nhà vệ sinh, chúng tôi đã kiểm tra và có biện pháp khắc phục.
Chúc Quý khách  có thật nhiều sức khỏe, hạnh phúc và bình an. Chúng tôi rất mong sẽ lại được chào đón Quý khách vào một dịp gần nhất. 
Trân trọng.
Ban quản lý vận hành
